alphabet-search-dp.last_note: Closed hole H1' (d=88/d=96 frontier scan). VERIFIED new record C_3a>=1.1752717416788478 at d=96,T=184: fresh exact DP reproduces |U+U|,|U-U|,q; certified rational bound <= true theta (mpmath@200dps); GHR constraint holds. Beats prior held by +7.97e-4. Recorded to held/README/3a.md.
alphabet-search-dp.summary: Re-optimize the non-uniform digit alphabet (A,d,T) with the validated exact-integer DP; certify any winner by directed-rounded rational log bound. Direct, Lean-feedable bound.

block-taper-probe.last_note: Holes H1/H2/H3 closed; genuine NEGATIVE result verified. Blocked engine validated 3 ways (homog-equiv, brute-force inhomog, fast-vs-slow). All 8 principled block schedules score below homogeneous at d=40, order survives to d=48 — inhomogeneous lever exhausted, no schedule to fill. HELD unchanged, nothing bogus written. RETHINK (lever dead).
block-taper-probe.summary: Principled probe-driven inhomogeneous block construction: per-block alphabets, d=40 sensitivity probe ranks schedules, lift top 1-2 to full d, exact-DP + certified log bound vs HELD. Sanctioned Lever D (schedule supplied, not blind).

ghr-lemma-lean.last_note: Closed H0 (Lake bootstrap), H2 (counts), H3 (log inequality). lake build green + axiom-clean (#print axioms = propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound, NO sorryAx) — verified by re-run. Machine-checks d=84 exponent ineq >1.1740744 (below held, by design). Remaining hole H1: GHR2007 single-set bridge NOT formalized in Lean — so it certifies the construction, not the full C_3a chain. Does not raise numerical held. CHANGES REQUESTED: formalize H1 next.
ghr-lemma-lean.summary: Formalize the GHR single-set lemma in Lean and import a winner's exact counts as a lake-build-green theorem; gated on a heavy bootstrap and on a numerical winner existing first.

maxdigit-base-sweep.summary: Sweep the max digit M (hence carry-free base 2M+1) via cheap moderate-d exact DP; lift any M!=10 winner to full d and certify > held, else verified-negative that base 21 is optimal nearby. Same exact-DP + rational-log certificate shape as alphabet-search-dp.

per-position-alphabet.summary: Position-dependent digit alphabets — strict superset of the homogeneous family; needs a reasoned tapered schedule. Same exact-DP certificate path.

td-retune-d80.last_note: H1/H2/H3 all closed and reviewer-verified: re-ran full DP from scratch at d=80,T=154 (|U+U|,|U-U|,max all match cached), re-derived the base-21 atanh log bound (genuine lower bound via mpmath), GHR constraint holds. Certified C_3a >= 1.174171353998482 > record 1.1740744 (+9.7e-5). Target hole-free; record broken, though superseded by alphabet-search-dp's larger margin.
td-retune-d80.summary: One-parameter T-scan at the record alphabet & d=80: re-tune the sum cap T past Griego's 150 (T/d optimum sits at ~1.90-1.95, confirmed at d=40). Cheapest concrete shot; same exact-DP + rational-log certificate path.

zheng-nonuniform-ratefn.summary: Extend Zheng's Cramer rate function to non-uniform digit distributions to guide the search and give a ceiling; asymptotic must be realized as a finite certified construction.
